mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tpl_edit_lock WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND template_id = #{templateId} AND audit_year = #{auditYear} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tpl_edit_lock (enterprise_id, template_id, audit_year, lock_user_id, lock_time, expire_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{enterpriseId}, #{templateId}, #{auditYear}, #{lockUserId}, #{lockTime}, #{expireTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE tpl_edit_lock SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND template_id = #{templateId} AND audit_year = #{auditYear}
